contract_scope: Client-to-server envelope for embedding generation. Consumed by POST /api/embed (#R-4). The envelope is pinned here so the validator (domain/embedding/embedding_request.php) and catalog parity tests share one authoritative shape.
honesty_rules: texts is an array of plain strings. Each string is embedded independently by the llama.cpp /v1/embeddings endpoint; the backend does NOT concatenate or re-chunk them. Clients that need chunking must chunk before calling this endpoint (see #R-6 text_chunker).

model_selector resolves against the registry filtered by model_type=embedding. A model_selector that matches a chat model is rejected with 'model_not_found' — the embedding worker cannot serve chat models.
options.normalize controls L2 normalization of returned vectors. Default true. When false, raw vectors are returned as emitted by llama.cpp.
options.truncate controls whether input texts exceeding the model's context length are silently truncated. Default true. When false, over-length texts are rejected with 'invalid_request_envelope'.

Returned embeddings are float arrays. Dimensions depend on the model (nomic-embed-text-v1.5 produces 768-dim vectors). The dimensions field is authoritative for the response — do not hardcode it client-side.

rejection_codes.invalid_request_envelope: any required field missing; any field out-of-range; unknown top-level keys; wrong type for a required field; text over context length when truncate=false
rejection_codes.model_not_found: model_selector did not match any embedding-type registry row (model_name + quantization + model_type=embedding)
rejection_codes.worker_unavailable: the embedding worker failed to start or failed during generation

details.field: dotted path of the failing leaf
